title: Safe Internet & Link Safety
description: Test your ability to recognize suspicious links and practice safe browsing habits.

questions.prompt: Why should you be cautious when clicking links?

choices.text: Links may lead to malicious websites or malware

questions.explanation: Malicious links may lead to fake login pages, malware downloads, or scams.

questions.prompt: True or False: Hovering over a link can help reveal its true destination.
questions.explanation: Hovering over a link often shows the real URL before clicking.

questions.prompt: Why are shortened links sometimes risky?

choices.text: They hide the real destination of the link

questions.explanation: Shortened links hide the full destination, making it harder to verify where the link leads.

choices.text: A website with similar spelling designed to trick users

questions.explanation: Attackers create domains that look similar to trusted sites to trick users.

questions.prompt: True or False: HTTPS guarantees that a website is completely safe.
questions.explanation: HTTPS encrypts communication but does not guarantee the website itself is legitimate.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is a warning sign of a suspicious website?
questions.explanation: Misspelled or unusual domains may indicate a fraudulent website.

questions.prompt: What should you do if a website suddenly asks you to download unexpected software?

choices.text: Close the page and avoid the download

questions.explanation: Unexpected downloads can contain malware and should be avoided.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is a safe browsing habit?

choices.text: Click links immediately without checking them
Verify website addresses before entering information

questions.explanation: Checking website addresses helps ensure you are visiting legitimate sites.

questions.prompt: What is the safest approach when encountering unfamiliar links?

choices.text: Click them quickly to see where they go
Pause and verify the link first

questions.explanation: Taking time to verify a link helps prevent many cyber incidents.

questions.prompt: Which of the following helps reduce risk when browsing online?

choices.text: Using trusted websites and verifying links

questions.explanation: Using trusted sites and verifying links helps reduce the risk of phishing and malware.
